verse_text: Then you shall say to him, 'The Lord God of the Hebrews has sent me to you, saying, 'Let My people go, to serve Me in the desert'; but indeed, until now you would not hear.

pericope.title: The Plague of Water Turned to Blood

links.context: As in the first plague of Egypt ([[EXO.7:14]]-25), the sea, marine life, and maritime commerce are affected.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
